name: Studio
description: Warm, creative theme with coral accents and rich purple premium highlights. Friendly, approachable, premium but not cold. Inspired by Figma, Framer, Gumroad.

decorators.studio-canvas: Warm background using theme background token. Friendly, inviting foundation.
decorators.studio-surface: Soft surface elevation with 1px warm border and subtle shadow. Uses surface background.
decorators.studio-input: Warm border with coral focus ring and gentle glow effect. Friendly input styling.
decorators.studio-card: Surface background, soft shadow, 12px radius, hover lift transition.
decorators.studio-card-premium: Premium card with purple gradient border for exclusive content.
decorators.studio-divider: Warm hairline separator using border-color token.
decorators.studio-badge-tier: Tier badge with gradient backgrounds for subscription levels.
decorators.studio-avatar-creator: Larger creator avatar with accent ring highlight.
decorators.studio-fade-up: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 16px to 0, 250ms ease-out.
decorators.studio-skeleton: Loading placeholder with warm pulse animation.
decorators.studio-glow: Subtle primary-tinted glow effect for call-to-action buttons.
decorators.studio-gate-blur: Backdrop blur effect for content behind paywalls.

dashboard.description: Creator dashboard with sidebar navigation. Analytics, content management, subscriber views.

storefront.description: Fan-facing storefront with top navigation. Creator profiles, content browsing.

checkout.description: Minimal checkout flow with focused content area.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with warm accents.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with warm card styling.
